name: Personally Identifiable Information (PII)
description: Data elements that can be used alone or in combination to identify a specific individual.

name: Information System
column6: and IT services used to process and manage data.

name: Documented Information
column7: and evidence maintained by the organization to prove compliance.

name: Temporary File
description: Transient data generated by systems during normal operations that requires periodic secure disposal.

name: Storage Media
description: The physical or logical storage locations (e.g.
column6: cloud buckets) where data is kept.

name: Log
description: Audit trails and system event records used for security monitoring

name: Consent
description: A tracked and recorded agreement from an individual allowing specific processing of their data.
